HUD / FHA Multifamily Development

Legal counsel for HUD-insured multifamily development.

We guide developers and lenders through FHA-insured 221(d)(4) financing — the new construction and substantial rehabilitation of market-rate and affordable multifamily housing.

Experience That Closes

Decades of guiding HUD multifamily transactions to the closing table.

Deep command of the FHA program, HUD closing requirements, and the documentation that keeps complex deals on schedule.

What We Do

Practice Areas

Focused counsel across the full life of a HUD-insured multifamily loan.

221(d)(4) New Construction

Counsel through FHA-insured loans for ground-up multifamily development, from application to closing.

Substantial Rehabilitation

Structuring 221(d)(4) financing for the substantial rehab and repositioning of existing multifamily assets.

Affordable & Market-Rate

Experience across market-rate, LIHTC, and income-restricted affordable housing developments.

Closings & Documentation

HUD closing requirements, loan documents, and lender coordination handled cleanly and on time.
